hand deliver... for time savings

--- kellens@earthlink.net wrote:

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Roy BLACK RBLACK@royblack.com
Sent: Dec 26, 2005 6:52 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net,
GuyFronstin@mindspring.com, Mark Shapiro
MShapiro@royblack.com, Roy BLACK
RBLACK@royblack.com, Scott Kornspan
SKornspan@royblack.com
Subject: Re: J.Epstein

This draft sounds just right to me so let's send it
to Recarey. Make sure copies are also sent to
Krischer, Lana and Dahlia. Tomorrow my office will
fedex the attachments both to Alan's office and
Guy's. This will give Alan the option of sending the
letter from his office or having hand-delivered from
Guy's. Our office was closed today because it is a
national holiday since Christmas was on Sunday.
Unfortunately I just learned this today so we are a
day behind schedule. Roy

kellens@earthlink.net 12/26/05 6:36 PM >>>
Attached please find Alan's draft. We are hoping
that we can deliver the package to Recarey and
prosecutors tomorrow. Thank you, Jeffrey
